title: pilosella iserana subsp. fasciculata
intro: Pilosella iserana subsp. fasciculata, also known as a type of flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family, is a subspecies of Pilosella iserana. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Pilosella iserana subsp. fasciculata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
